# stacklet_gcp_integration_surface (Data Source)

Retrieve GCP integration configuration details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stacklet_gcp_integration_surface" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `aws_relay` (Attributes) AWS relay configuration for GCP integration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_relay))
- `trust_aws` (Attributes) AWS trust configuration for GCP integration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--trust_aws))

<a id="nestedatt--aws_relay"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws_relay`

Read-Only:

- `bus_arn` (String) The ARN of the AWS EventBridge bus to relay events to.
- `role_arn` (String) The ARN of the AWS IAM role used for the relay.


<a id="nestedatt--trust_aws"></a>
### Nested Schema for `trust_aws`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) The Stacklet deployment AWS account ID that GCP should integrate with.
- `assetdb_role_name` (String) The name of the IAM role used for AssetDB access.
- `cost_query_role_name` (String) The name of the IAM role used for cost queries access.
- `execution_role_name` (String) The name of the IAM role used for execution.
- `platform_role_name` (String) The name of the IAM role used for platform access.
